expectations.evidence: Every TR section reviewed has a **Source:** line with Hugo-relative links.
TR-11 names GitHub and TR-24 names email but only because the source UX docs literally say so; agent flagged both in transcript and offered to abstract on review. No invented tech choices.
No ADR options or solutions proposed in transcript.
Transcript: 'When you're done, set reviewed_at: in the frontmatter to today's ISO date.'
Transcript: 'The next skill — plan-adrs — won't enumerate decisions until that's set.'
